text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, just as we're about to start a meeting in
my office...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I have a special favor to ask of you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's about an upcoming scrimmage. I would like to
join.
choice_data_list: Are you sure? You've got a big race coming up.
Are you sure? You've got a big race coming up.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Rest assured, I won't fail. I fully intend to triumph
in both.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'd like your permission. What do you
think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I decide to respect Yaeno Muteki's
strong conviction...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your guidance today! Now, if you'll
excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From then on, Yaeno Muteki takes off the second
we finish training each day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, however, I'm given a good reason to
believe she's hiding something from me. I'm
heading back to the academy after finishing some
errands in town, when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing a fierce shout, I follow the sound to find
Yaeno Muteki training alone in her signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, as I thought. I suspected the approaching
presence might be yours.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for training outside of our scheduled
routine. I just... I want to push my body and mind
to their very limits.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford the slightest risk of losing the
upcoming scrimmage, no matter what it takes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A few days ago, you see, I got a written
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It said, "After observing you run recently, I have
judged you a worthy adversary whose defeat will
bring honor to my name."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
"Meet me at the upcoming scrimmage so we may
determine who is the stronger between us."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As a student of the Yaegaki style, I cannot ignore
such a challenge. It must be met with unwavering
resolve.
choice_data_list: But... will your body hold out?
But... will your body hold out?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You needn't worry. This racewear fills my entire
body with vitality.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And that's because it is, in essence, proof of my
credentials.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Only G1 racers are permitted to wear signature
racewear. Defeat one such runner, and your name
will rise in an instant. It's a proof of strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I believe that, in Kongo Yaegaki terms, attaining
it is the equivalent of being recognized at a
professional level.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Weakness is no longer permitted at that point.
You must protect those important to you at all
times, as well as the helpless and your own pride.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The more advanced students run through the
mountains at night, split wood with their bare
hands, hurl immense boulders, and herald the
dawn with a thousand strikes of the great bell—all
while remaining calm and composed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No matter how tough the situation, your strength
mustn't waver. That is what it means to be a
student of the Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In the same vein, for as long as I wear this outfit, I
intend to be a powerful force who won't lose to
anyone—not even myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, even if I'm challenged again in the
future, I refuse to back down. I will use each
challenge as an opportunity to display the
strength of the Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I beg of you—please allow this
unworthy student to pursue her wish.
choice_data_list:
Show them the strength of one who wears
signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! Let the tempering continue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Yaeno Muteki continues her training. She
brings her mind, body, and technique into perfect
harmony, and she enters the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're on the homestretch! Yaeno Muteki is
moving up the pack! She's slipped into the lead!
And... it's Yaeno Muteki crossing the finish three
lengths ahead of the next runner!

text_block_list.name: Surprised Student
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! Her raw power was overwhelming!
Though the racer in second did manage to hold
out till the end!

text_block_list.name: Cogent Student
text_block_list.text:
No... She saw through the flow of the race and her
opponent's movements as if she was looking
through clear water. She achieved victory like a
true master.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki's Challenger
text_block_list.text:
Impressive. You were a step ahead in every
aspect. I'll need to rethink my training methods.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your challenge was the impetus for my growth, so
please accept my deepest thanks.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And thank you for bearing witness, Trainer. Do
you think I was able to fully demonstrate the
spirit of the Kongo Yaegaki style?
choice_data_list:
I caught a glimpse of the strength of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I believe this is all a manifestation of
my daily efforts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And the reason I'm able to continue my daily
training without an ounce of uncertainty is
because I trust that the path I'm walking is right.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And that is all because I have sincere faith in the mentor who guides me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I will hold your teachings close to my
heart and continue to dedicate myself to training.
Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I am delighted to hear that. To think that I've been able to demonstrate the source of my pride to you... This is a special feeling indeed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind if I took a moment to speak
about the Yaegaki style?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Ahem, let me begin by telling you
about its origins...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find that the usually stern Yaeno Muteki
becomes quite chatty when discussing the style
she takes such pride in. A warm smile spreads
across my face as I listen to her speak.
